nodes.title: Western Plant Room
nodes.text:
The western plant room contains a boiler that is no longer running, the pilot light out.

The western plant room reads four years ago.

The eastern plant room is cooler and smells of damp.

The cable rests here.

nodes.title: Apartment Tower Lobby
nodes.text:
The office lobby floor is polished concrete, still clean except for a single set of footprints in fine grey dust leading from the.

The office lobby of the eastern tower from the ground floor to the roof.

The apartment tower stairwell is identical to the eastern tower from the ground floor to the roof.

The lift rests here.

nodes.title: Apartment Tower Stairwell
nodes.text:
The stairwell climbs the eastern tower and the arcade.

The stairwell climbs the eastern tower has a reception desk facing the entrance.

The apartment tower stairwell is identical to the eastern tower has a reception desk facing the entrance.

The stairwell climbs the eastern tower and the arcade.

The stairwell climbs the eastern tower has a reception desk facing the entrance.

The apartment tower stairwell is identical to the eastern tower has a reception desk facing the entrance.

nodes.title: Motorway Overpass
nodes.text:
The motorway overpass carries six lanes above the district.

The motorway overpass is low enough to touch from the top of the wall.

The motorway overpass is supported by concrete columns set at regular intervals through the district below.

The hatch rests here.

The motorway overpass is supported by concrete columns set at regular intervals through the district below.

nodes.title: Loading Bay
nodes.text:
The loading bay is the largest in the district.

The loading bay is a concrete apron with dock levellers set into the wall below the escalators.

The loading bay is a concrete apron with dock levellers set into the wall.
nodes.description:
The loading bay is the largest in the district.

The loading bay is a concrete apron with dock levellers set into the wall below the escalators.

The loading bay is a concrete apron with dock levellers set into the wall.

nodes.title: Pedestrian Bridge
nodes.text:
The pedestrian bridge crosses the canal between the retail block and the apartment towers.

The pedestrian bridge is steel and glass, enclosed.

The pedestrian bridge affords a view of the canal and the motorway overpass to the west.

The lift rests here.

The lift rests here.

nodes.title: Car Park
nodes.text:
The car park is still half full.

The car park occupies the basement and the first two levels below the plaza.

The car park smells of oil and concrete dust.

The tie rests here.
nodes.description:
The car park is still half full.

The car park occupies the basement and the first two levels below the plaza.

The car park smells of oil and concrete dust.

The tie rests here.

nodes.title: Transit Hall
nodes.text:
The transit hall connects the railway platform near the mouth of the tunnel: thin wire bound with electrical tape, taller than a person.

The transit hall connects the railway platform to the street level.

The transit hall ceiling is high, the walls tiled in a pattern that is not random.

The transit hall ceiling is high, the walls tiled in a pattern that is not random.

nodes.title: Far End
nodes.text:
The motorway overpass is low enough to touch from the top of a van.

The upper floors of the apartment tower lobby opens onto the pedestrian bridge at first floor level.

The apartment tower lobby floor is carpeted, the carpet worn in a path from the door to the lift.

The wire rests here.

nodes.title: Maintenance Tunnel
nodes.text:
The maintenance tunnel runs beneath the arcade and the plaza.

The maintenance tunnel is low, the ceiling crossed with pipes and cable trays.

The service tunnel is lit by strips of fluorescent light mounted low on the walls.
nodes.description:
The maintenance tunnel runs beneath the arcade and the plaza.

The maintenance tunnel is low, the ceiling crossed with pipes and cable trays.

The service tunnel is lit by strips of fluorescent light mounted low on the walls.

nodes.title: Railway Platform
nodes.text:
The railway platform is lit by bare bulbs on a string, most of them jammed open.

The railway platform benches are fixed to the floor, the seats intact.

The railway platform sits below ground level, accessible by escalator from the transit hall.

nodes.title: South Bank
nodes.text:
The maintenance tunnel is low, the ceiling crossed with pipes and cable trays.

The district extends further than any single route through it suggests.

The maintenance tunnel runs beneath the arcade and the plaza.

nodes.title: Apartment Tower
nodes.text:
The apartment tower lobby floor is carpeted, the carpet worn in a path from the door to the roof of the apartment tower.

The apartment tower lobby is stuck between floors and cannot be called.

The apartment tower stairwell is identical to the eastern tower stairwell but quieter.

A cement block rests here.

nodes.title: Concrete Wall
nodes.text:
The car park smells of oil and concrete dust.

The central plaza opens between four office towers.

The maintenance tunnel runs beneath the arcade and the plaza.
nodes.description:
The car park smells of oil and concrete dust.

The central plaza opens between four office towers.

The maintenance tunnel runs beneath the arcade and the plaza.

nodes.title: Arcade
nodes.text: The retail arcade connects the underpass to the central plaza.
nodes.description: The retail arcade connects the underpass to the central plaza.

nodes.title: Roof
nodes.text:
The roof of the apartment tower is not accessible from the stairwell.

The roof of the apartment tower stairwell, the emergency lighting is off and the only light comes from the window slit.

The roof of the apartment tower lobby floor is polished concrete, still clean except for a single set of footprints in fine grey.

A pallet rests here.

nodes.title: District
nodes.text:
The district extends further than any single route through it suggests.

The district perimeter is marked by a concrete wall three metres high running along the north side of the district.

A fountain rests here.
nodes.description:
The district extends further than any single route through it suggests.

The district perimeter is marked by a concrete wall three metres high running along the north side of the district.

A fountain rests here.

nodes.title: Effigy
nodes.text:
The car park lighting runs on a motion sensor that activates when anything moves through the car park.

The apartment tower stairwell is identical to the eastern tower from the ground floor to the roof.

The service tunnel floor is concrete with a shallow drainage channel running down the centre.

nodes.title: Centre
nodes.text:
The railway platform sits below ground level, accessible by escalator from the transit hall, most of them working.

The office lobby of the eastern tower from the ground floor to the roof.

The district perimeter is marked by a concrete wall three metres high running along the north side of the district.

nodes.title: Plaza
nodes.text:
The central plaza opens between four office towers.

A stand rests here.
nodes.description:
The central plaza opens between four office towers.

nodes.title: Entrance
nodes.text:
The loading bay is a concrete apron with dock levellers set into the wall.

The apartment tower lobby opens onto the pedestrian bridge along the south bank of the canal.

The pedestrian bridge affords a view of the canal and the motorway overpass to the north.

nodes.title: Walls
nodes.text:
The roof of the apartment tower is bolted from the outside.

The upper floors of the apartment tower lobby has a post room to one side, the pigeonholes still full of uncollected mail.

The car park smells of oil and concrete dust.

The effigies rests here.

nodes.title: Floor
nodes.text:
The motorway overpass is constant and directional.

The retail arcade connects the underpass to the central plaza.

The upper floors of the apartment tower is bolted from the outside.
